---
title: "EE380: Control Systems"
format: html
toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
# EE380 — Control Systems
**Spring 2026** · **Instructor:** Dr. Ali AlBeladi & Ali Mustafa (TA OH: 1-2PM, Mon & Wed)<br>
Build intuition and design skills for feedback control using real engineering examples.
:::

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="60%"}
## Start here

**What to do before the first lecture**
- Read the [Syllabus](policy.qmd) (grading, exam rules, late policy)
- Check the [Calendar](calendar.qmd) for this week’s slides + topics
- Bookmark the [Homework](homework.qmd) page (all deadlines live there)
- Install **MATLAB/Simulink** (recommended) and **Python** (optional for demos)

::: {.callout-important appearance="minimal"}
### Where to look for updates
This website is the **single source of truth** for announcements, schedule updates, and deadlines.
:::
:::

::: {.column width="10%"}

:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
## Quick links


::: {.quick-links}
[📘 Course Policy](policy.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .btn-sm .w-100 .mb-2}
[📅 Schedule & Materials](calendar.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .w-100 .mb-2}
[📝 Homework](homework.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .w-100 .mb-2}
[🧩 Modules](modules.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .w-100 .mb-2}
[🚀 Project](project.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn-sm .w-100}
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
### This week
- Topic: *Modeling + Intro to Feedback*
- Deliverable: **HW1** (see Homework page)
- Reading: listed on the Calendar
:::
:::
:::

---

## Announcements

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-body}
### Quiz 3
Kindly be informed that quiz 3, on chapter 5 (Lectures of 24 Feb. to 10 Mar), will take place on Tuesday, April 7. All the best.
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-body}
### HW2 and Quiz 2
Please check the [Homework page](homework.qmd) for HW2 details and the due date/time. Also, be informed that quiz 2, on chapter 4, will take place on Feb 17. All the best.
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-body}
### Major exams schedule 
Please refer to the [Course Policy page](policy.qmd) for the major exams' dates.
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-body}
### Week 2 — HW1 is posted
Please check the [Homework page](homework.qmd) for HW1 details and the due date/time.
:::
:::

::: {.card .mb-3}
::: {.card-body}
### Week 1 — Getting started
Welcome to the course! Please review the [Syllabus](policy.qmd) and install MATLAB/Simulink.  
Python is optional unless you want to run local simulations.
:::
:::
